content.json:
## SOCRadar Entra ID — Combined Dashboard
All employee credential exposures across SOCRadar sources (Botnet Data, PII Exposure, VIP Protection), enriched with Microsoft Entra ID status and remediation actions.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| count
| project Count
content.title: Total Records (All Sources)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where entra_status_s == "found"
| count
| project Count
content.title: Employees Found in Entra ID

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_Botnet_CL, SOCRadar_PII_CL, SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where entra_status_s == "compromised"
| count
| project Count
content.title: Confirmed Compromised

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Actions=sum(toint(actions_taken_d))
| project Actions
content.title: Actions Taken (24h)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII"),
(SOCRadar_VIP_CL | extend Source="VIP")
| summarize Count=count() by Source
| order by Count desc
content.title: Records by Source

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII"),
(SOCRadar_VIP_CL | extend Source="VIP")
| summarize Count=count() by entra_status_s, Source
| order by Count desc
content.title: Entra ID Status by Source

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII"),
(SOCRadar_VIP_CL | extend Source="VIP")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), Source
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Records Over Time by Source

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| summarize Count=count() by source_s
| order by Count desc
content.title: Import Runs by Source

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| summarize Found=sum(toint(found_count_d)), NotFound=sum(toint(not_found_count_d)), Actions=sum(toint(actions_taken_d)), Errors=sum(toint(error_count_d)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Audit Metrics Over Time

content.query:
SOCRadar_EntraID_Audit_CL
| project TimeGenerated, source_s, total_records_d, employee_records_d, found_count_d, not_found_count_d, actions_taken_d, error_count_d, duration_sec_d
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 30
content.title: Recent Import Runs

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(SOCRadar_Botnet_CL | extend Source="Botnet"),
(SOCRadar_PII_CL | extend Source="PII")
| where entra_status_s in ("found", "compromised")
| where password_present_b == true
| project TimeGenerated, Source, email_s, entra_status_s, is_plaintext_b, actions_taken_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Employees Found in Entra ID with Password
